// 1. Get all association definitions for the Post model.
assocInfo = model("Post").associationInfo();

// 2. Check whether a specific association exists and inspect its type.
assocInfo = model("Post").associationInfo();
if (StructKeyExists(assocInfo, "comments")) {
    writeOutput(assocInfo.comments.type); // "hasMany"
}

// 3. Loop over every association to list names and their types.
assocInfo = model("Post").associationInfo();
for (assocName in assocInfo) {
    writeOutput(assocName & ": " & assocInfo[assocName].type & "<br>");
}
